description_long: This object is a modern, tactical shotgun with a predominantly matte black finish and angular, robust design. The shotgun features a long, rectangular barrel assembly with a vented or ribbed upper section, and a prominent, squared-off fore-end. The stock is adjustable and has a tactical, modular appearance, with a thick, ribbed buttpad and a cheek rest. The receiver area is compact, with a large, rectangular trigger guard and a visible trigger. There are yellow accent markings on the receiver, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark color scheme. The overall build suggests a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, angular design, and yellow accent markings. Features a long barrel, adjustable stock, and a large rectangular trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long barrel, adjustable stock, and yellow accent on the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible yellow warning label and detailed stock structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the ribbed buttpad of the stock and the overall symmetry of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long rectangular with vented or ribbed upper section
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rectangular, elongated trigger guard with straight edges and no visible finger grooves
